name: rflow-harness
description: Versioned Codex harness factory for PRD-driven projects.

interface.shortDescription: Create and run PRD-driven project harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Rflow Harness installs a common lifecycle harness, composes domain and project overlays, creates master and phase plans, audits planning documents, and runs phase-scoped implementation handoffs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Rflow Harness to turn my PRD into a project harness, master plan, phase plans, audit, and phase run workflow.
